UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing meta progress, gamification state, badges, and onboarding inputs

DailyLog.title: DailyLog
DailyLog.description: Dynamic daily meal tracking, actual water consumption, and sleep duration logs

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user configuration and progress profiles

/users/{userId}/dailyLogs/{date}.description: Synchronized subcollection containing individual daily logs for meal adherence

/users/{userId}/hairPhotos/{photoId}.description: Subcollection store of hair photo progress snapshots and automated dandruff, fall scoring metrics

/geminiLogs/{logId}.description: Application logs tracking AI model token counts and cost
